reviews.review_description:
First thank you developers of this good game, I like it.
More please , more new maps,  more gameplay modes,  more targets to aim .
Option to review the trailer of path throwing action.  Able to see and review the hand movement and axe trailer .   Get more colorful targets,  like balloons,  apple, grass bottles.  . . Please continue to add more contents if possible.   Thank you

developer_response.body: Great notes! Multiplayer, maps, and new game modes will be coming soon (2022)

reviews.review_description: Very fun! Arcade style throwing with good physics. Would like to see multiplayer and more interactive environments!
